title: moraea alpina
intro: Moraea alpina, also known as the Alpine Irises or Moraea, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Moraea alpina include relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its roots can be used to make a paste or powder for topical applications.
